highlights.text: I wrote yesterday: “The ultra bull case for tomorrow is that this current consolidation we’ve been in since Friday is a bull flag (and it is a bull flag, its just a question of whether it breaks out or not)….This would then mean revisiting 6032-38 from here, perhaps final reaction, then on to 6051 to revisit the ATH”.

post_title: Yet Again, SPX is Coiled Tight. A Big Move Is Coming. What Way? Nov 14th Plan
